backstory.original: Abandoned as an infant and adopted by an outcast dragonborn warrior, Farideh grew to adulthood acutely aware of the drawbacks of being a tiefling. While those from the Nine Hells do their utmost to corrupt her, Farideh isn't interested in power so much as defending the world from demons, the undead, and any other villains trying to bring trouble or drag her friends and family into danger.
backstory.display: 法莉德在婴儿时被遗弃，随后被一名流浪的龙裔战士收养。在成年后，她深刻地意识到了作为一名提夫林的缺点。虽然那些来自九层地狱的存在竭力想腐蚀她，但法莉德对力量并不感兴趣。她想要的是保护世界，使其不受恶魔、亡灵，以及任何其他试图带来麻烦或将她朋友和家人拖入危险的恶棍所侵害。

description.original: Farideh creates $attack_num_targets rays of fire and hurls them at random enemies.
description.display: 法莉德召唤出 $attack_num_targets 道火焰射线，并将其投向随机敌人。

description.original: Farideh taps into her infernal bloodline, pushing away, slowing, and damaging nearby enemies.
description.display: 法莉德展露出她的地狱血脉，击退、减速并伤害附近的敌人。

longDescription.original: Farideh taps into her infernal bloodline, pushing away and slowing all enemies, then damaging a random enemy every second, for 15 seconds.
longDescription.display: 法莉德展露出她的地狱血脉，击退、减速所有敌人，然后每秒对一名随机敌人造成伤害，持续 15 秒。

description.original: Enemies that strike Farideh (can be expanded to allies via upgrades and specializations) take instant damage based on Farideh's DPS.
description.display: 攻击法莉德（可通过进阶和专精扩展至包括队友）的敌人，会立即受到基于法莉德的秒伤的伤害。

description.original: Increase the damage of Farideh for each Tiefling in the formation.
description.display: 阵型中每有一名提夫林，都会为法莉德提高伤害。

description.desc: Enemies that attack any Champion in the formation trigger Farideh's Hellish Rebuke. The enemy is surrounded by green flames for $berserk_time seconds and immediately takes $amount seconds worth of BUD damage.
攻击阵型中任意勇士的敌人会触发法莉德的“炼狱叱喝”。该敌人会被绿色火焰包围，持续 $berserk_time 秒，并立刻受到相当于 $amount 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害。

tipText.original: Farideh's Hellish Rebuke triggers when enemies hit her or her allies, dealing big damage to the enemy.
tipText.display: 当敌人击中法莉德或者她的盟友时，她的“炼狱叱喝”就会触发，对该敌人造成巨大的伤害。

description.desc: Whenever Farideh's Hellish Rebuke triggers, Farideh's damage is increased by $amount%. This stacks multiplicatively up to $max_stacks___2 times, and the stacks reset when changing areas.
每当法莉德的“炼狱叱喝”触发，法莉德的伤害提高 $amount%。该数值以乘算方式堆叠，最多可堆叠 $max_stacks___2 次，并会在变更区域时重置。
Farideh's damage is increased by $amount% for each Tiefling Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位提夫林勇士，法莉德的伤害提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Farideh's damage is increased by the number of tieflings in the formation. Load up your formation with tieflings to really power her up!
tipText.display: 法莉德的伤害随着阵型中的提夫林数量而提高。在阵型中加入更多提夫林，让她尽情发挥力量！

description.desc: Farideh taps into her infernal bloodline, surrounding herself in a nimbus of flames and sprouting a pair of fiery wings from her back for 15 seconds. This causes all enemies to go berserk, resulting in them moving 50% faster, attacking twice as often, but dealing 90% less damage. During this time, her flaming aura shoots slivers of flame at random enemies once per second, dealing massive damage.
法莉德展露出她的地狱血脉，她将自己笼罩在一个火焰光环内，背后生出一对火焰之翼，持续 15 秒。这会使所有敌人发狂，导致他们的移动速度增加 50%，攻击频率加倍，但造成的伤害减少 90%。在此期间，她的火焰光环会向随机敌人发射火焰，频率为每秒一次，造成高额伤害。

Pact Family now also gains a stack for each Dragonborn Champion in the formation, and its post-stack effect is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)%. Chosen of Asmodeus stacks are halved when changing areas if Mehen is in the formation, rather than resetting to 0.
现在阵型中每有一位龙裔勇士，“契约家族”也会堆叠一层，并且它的堆叠后效果提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%。如果梅亨位于阵型中，那么在变更区域时，“被阿斯摩蒂斯选中者”的堆叠层数将减半，而不是重置为 0。

specializationDescription.original: Farideh seeks out Mehen and other Dragonborn Champions to assist her in battle.
specializationDescription.display: 法莉德找梅亨和其他龙裔勇士来协助她作战。

description.desc: Farideh gains the Debuff role, and whenever Chosen of Asmodeus is at more than $stack_threshold___2 stacks, Farideh deals $(not_buffed amount___2)% more damage against enemies currently affected by Hellish Rebuke for each stack above $stack_threshold___2 she has, stacking multiplicatively.
法莉德获得减益角色定位，并且每当“被阿斯摩蒂斯选中者”的堆叠层数大于 $stack_threshold___2 时，她拥有的堆叠层数每比 $stack_threshold___2 多 1，她对当前受“炼狱叱喝”影响的敌人就会多造成 $(not_buffed amount___2)% 的伤害，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Farideh doubles down on her link to Asmodeus, dealing more damage to enemies affected by Hellish Rebuke.
specializationDescription.display: 法莉德进一步强化她与阿斯摩蒂斯的联系，对受“炼狱叱喝”影响的敌人造成更多伤害。

description.desc: Farideh gains the Hunter role, Fiends become her favored foe, and the effect of Hellish Rebuke is increased by $(amount___3)% on all Fiends. By sheer dumb luck, each wave of enemies in non-boss areas has a $(amount___4)% chance to spawn $(spawn_min___4)-$(spawn_max___4) Fiends, and all bosses now count as demonic Fiends for the purposes of all abilities that care about such things.
法莉德获得猎人角色定位，炼狱生物变成她的偏好对手，并且“炼狱叱喝”对所有炼狱生物造成的效果提高 $(amount___3)%。纯属走运，非首领区域的每波敌人有 $(amount___4)% 的几率刷新 $(spawn_min___4)-$(spawn_max___4) 只炼狱生物，并且对于所有影响恶魔炼狱生物的技能，所有首领现在会被视为恶魔炼狱生物。

specializationDescription.original: Farideh seeks out the Demons that befuddle her sister, Havilar, and attempts to wipe them from existence.
specializationDescription.display: 法莉德追寻那些迷惑她姐妹哈维拉的恶魔，并试图彻底消灭它们。

description.desc: Increases the post-stack effect of Pact Family by $(amount)% when Havilar is in the formation. Additionally, whenever Havilar sacrifices her Imps, the stack cap of Chosen of Asmodeus is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2), stacking up to $max_stacks___2 times ($total_additional_stacks_desc additional stacks total).
当哈维拉在阵型中时，“契约家族”的堆叠后效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%。此外，每当哈维拉牺牲她的小魔鬼时，“被阿斯摩蒂斯选中者”的堆叠层数上限提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)，最多可堆叠 $max_stacks___2 次（总共可额外堆叠 $total_additional_stacks_desc 层）。

conditions.desc: ^^“契约家族”的堆叠后增益激活：{是}#00FF00
^^“契约家族”的堆叠后增益激活：{否}#FF0000

effect_keys.current_value_bonus_desc: 总加成：额外 $(bonus) 层堆叠层数上限

description.original: I just want my friends to be safe.
description.display: 我只希望我的朋友们安全无恙。

description.original: I am the element of death in battle.
description.display: 在战场上我就是死亡元素。

description.original: What trouble did Havi get into this time?
description.display: 哈维这次又闯什么祸了？

description.original: Maybe that eldritch blast was a little quick.
description.display: 也许那个魔能爆弹有点快。

description.original: You're about to have a very bad day.
description.display: 你要倒大霉了。

description.original: Havi, get down!
description.display: 哈维，趴下！

description.original: Freely... I think something just happened... Where's Havilar?
description.display: 弗里......我觉得刚才好像发生了什么事......哈维拉在哪？

description.original: This power is evil. I fear what it may do.
description.display: 这股力量很邪恶。我很担心，不知道它可能会造成什么后果。

description.original: I didn't ask for this power, but it's mine now. I'll use it for good.
description.display: 我并未主动寻求这股力量，但它现在是我的了。我会把它用在正道上的。

description.original: When I close my eyes, I see it. That terrible place...
description.display: 当我闭上眼睛，我就能看到它。那个可怕的地方……

effects.description: Increases Farideh's Chosen of Asmodeus max stacks to 30

description.original: We know things that maybe we should not.
description.display: 我们知道一些或许不应该知道的事情。

description.original: Not all tieflings are pure evil, you know?
description.display: 并非所有提夫林都是纯粹的邪恶，明白我的意思吗？

description.original: Use the tools you have.
description.display: 利用一切你能利用的。

description.original: You may be stronger than me, but you're not stronger than my sister!
description.display: 虽然你比我强，但你没有我姐姐强！

description.original: My family tree is... complicated.
description.display: 我的家族谱系……很复杂。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Farideh's specializations by $amount%

description.original: Whatever he wants from me, it can't be good.
description.display: 不管他对我有什么企图，都不会是好事。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Farideh's specializations by $amount%

description.original: We stand together! Go, go, go!
description.display: 我们并肩作战！冲冲冲！

effects.description: Increases the chance of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: Here they come! Get ready!
description.display: 它们过来了！大家做好准备！

effects.description: Increases Farideh's Pact with Lorcan's number of fiends spawned to 3-4

description.original: What can I say? I like to read.
description.display: 我能说什么呢，我喜欢阅读。

description.original: I'll defeat you with the flames of the Hells if I have to.
description.display: 如有必要，我将用地狱之火打败你。

description.original: Cast enough fireballs, and most problems tend to go away.
description.display: 只要丢出足够多的火球，大部分问题都会解决。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Farideh's specializations by $amount%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Abandoned as an infant and adopted by an outcast dragonborn warrior, Farideh grew to adulthood acutely aware of the drawbacks of being a tiefling. While those from the Nine Hells do their utmost to corrupt her, Farideh isn't interested in power so much as defending the world from demons, the undead, and any other villains trying to bring trouble or drag her friends and family into danger.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Farideh's main mechanic is Hellish Rebuke, which does damage to enemies whenever she or her friends are hit.

event_upgrades.name: Hellish Rebuke
event_upgrades.description: Enemies that strike Farideh (can be expanded to allies via upgrades and specializations) take instant damage based on Farideh's DPS.

event_upgrades.name: Pact Family
event_upgrades.description: Increase the damage of Farideh for each Tiefling in the formation.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 法莉德在婴儿时被遗弃，随后被一名流浪的龙裔战士收养。在成年后，她深刻地意识到了作为一名提夫林的缺点。虽然那些来自九层地狱的存在竭力想腐蚀她，但法莉德对力量并不感兴趣。她想要的是保护世界，使其不受恶魔、亡灵，以及任何其他试图带来麻烦或将她朋友和家人拖入危险的恶棍所侵害。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 法莉德的主要机制是炼狱叱喝，在她或者她的朋友受到攻击时会对敌人造成伤害。

event_upgrades.name: 炼狱叱喝

event_upgrades.name: 契约家族
event_upgrades.description: 阵型中每有一名提夫林，都会为法莉德提高伤害。

original.long_description: Farideh taps into her infernal bloodline, pushing away and slowing all enemies, then damaging a random enemy every second, for 15 seconds.

original.description: When I close my eyes, I see it. That terrible place...

display.description: 它们过来了！大家做好准备！

effects.description: 使法莉德“与洛肯的契约”刷新的炼狱生物数量增加 3-4 个

original.name: Magius Infernus
original.description: Cast enough fireballs, and most problems tend to go away.

display.name: 玛济斯炼狱
display.description: 只要丢出足够多的火球，大部分问题都会解决。
